headline: Amcor Partners With DCM on Recycle-Ready Fertilizer Packaging in EU
summary: AMCR & DCM launch recycle-ready fertilizer packaging with 35% recycled plastic, cutting carbon footprint 17% and replacing hard-to-recycle multilayer packs.

raw.headline: Amcor Partners With DCM on Recycle-Ready Fertilizer Packaging in EU

headline: Amcor’s Italian Recyclable Films Line Puts Valuation And Dividend In Focus
summary: Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) has started a new production line in Italy focused on recyclable, high barrier films for packaging. The facility is designed to support future European regulations that require all packaging to be recyclable by 2030. This development adds to Amcor’s footprint in Europe and targets growing demand for more sustainable packaging solutions. For investors watching Amcor at a share price of $43.28, this new line in Italy arrives after a mixed share performance record, including...
